column2: Standard Event Envelope — All Events Share These Fields

column5: Purpose
Global unique identifier; used for idempotency and audit
Stable snake_case domain name (e.g., claim_verified)
Payload contract version for this event type
When the thing actually happened (business time)
When the system persisted the event
Aggregate stream for ordered replay (e.g., lead_123)
Aggregate class: lead | account | asset | review | decision_trace
Sequence number within the stream for deterministic reconstruction
The business entity the event is about {type, id}
Human or system that caused the event {type, id}
Groups related events in one workflow / request chain
Links this event to the prior triggering event
Org boundary for multi-tenancy
Capture context: {channel, system} (e.g., form, webhook, UI)
Business-specific event body — unique per event_name
Flat technical metadata only; no business logic
Applied policy context {version, rule_refs} when policy evaluation affects this event
Associated review context {review_id, status} for approval escalation or rejection-related events
Linked decision trace context {decision_trace_id} when the event has a separate explainability record
Identity or privacy classification in force when the event occurred (e.g., STRONG_IDENTIFIED, WEAK_CONTEXTUAL, ANONYMOUS)
